text_raw: How did I end up with such a halfwit for a business partner?
text_clean: How did I end up with such a halfwit for a business partner?

text_raw: The stolen cloudcarts probably got sold off already!
text_clean: The stolen cloudcarts probably got sold off already!

text_raw: Blasted idiot! Was it so hard, what I asked of you?
text_clean: Blasted idiot! Was it so hard, what I asked of you?

text_raw: All you had to do was guard the completed cloudcarts!
text_clean: All you had to do was guard the completed cloudcarts!

text_raw: Us? What do you mean us?
text_clean: Us? What do you mean us?

text_raw: This fool nearly got the whole town killed by sleeping on the job.
text_clean: This fool nearly got the whole town killed by sleeping on the job.

text_raw: Is it now?!
text_clean: Is it now?!

text_raw: We needed those cloudcarts to keep watch for raiders!
text_clean: We needed those cloudcarts to keep watch for raiders!

text_raw: What if some bandits... or the Reed Devil come prowling?
text_clean: What if some bandits... or the Reed Devil come prowling?

text_raw: It's all your fault, you idiot.
text_clean: It's all your fault, you idiot.

text_raw: What, you plan to fight them off? You can't even fight off sleep.
text_clean: What, you plan to fight them off? You can't even fight off sleep.

text_raw: G-Greymane, is that you? Please, lend us a hand!
text_clean: G-Greymane, is that you? Please, lend us a hand!

text_raw: That's a bit much!
text_clean: That's a bit much!

text_raw: I said I'd go find them, didn't I?
text_clean: I said I'd go find them, didn't I?

text_raw: Well, that's why we're asking him! Please help us get our balloons back!
text_clean: Well, that's why we're asking him! Please help us get our balloons back!

text_raw: It's a tough task, even for a Greymane.
text_clean: It's a tough task, even for a Greymane.

text_raw: Perhaps I've asked too much of him.
text_clean: Perhaps I've asked too much of him.

text_raw: It would be a miracle if they came back in one piece.
text_clean: It would be a miracle if they came back in one piece.

text_raw: Ha! And here I was worrying it was too dangerous. Seems I wasted my breath!
text_clean: Ha! And here I was worrying it was too dangerous. Seems I wasted my breath!

text_raw: You managed to deal with those thieves in remarkable fashion!
text_clean: You managed to deal with those thieves in remarkable fashion!

text_raw: Our cloudcarts will be airborne again in no time!
text_clean: Our cloudcarts will be airborne again in no time!

text_raw: With cloudcarts at our command, our lands are far safer.
text_clean: With cloudcarts at our command, our lands are far safer.

text_raw: If we fly up a few of these, we'll know the moment anyone draws near.
text_clean: If we fly up a few of these, we'll know the moment anyone draws near.

text_raw: No more surprise raids like last time.
text_clean: No more surprise raids like last time.

text_raw: Not that I crafted these for defense, mind you. Oh, no.
text_clean: Not that I crafted these for defense, mind you. Oh, no.

text_raw: I made them to glimpse the world above the clouds.
text_clean: I made them to glimpse the world above the clouds.

text_raw: Once I finish this, I'll take you up myself.
text_clean: Once I finish this, I'll take you up myself.

text_raw: After all, I owe you that much for helping us.
text_clean: After all, I owe you that much for helping us.

text_raw: I'm telling you, it's safe.
text_clean: I'm telling you, it's safe.

text_raw: What, you don't trust my handiwork?
text_clean: What, you don't trust my handiwork?

text_raw: What else would I put in it—chickens?
text_clean: What else would I put in it—chickens?

text_raw: Ah, perfect timing.
text_clean: Ah, perfect timing.

text_raw: I just finished getting everything ready, actually.
text_clean: I just finished getting everything ready, actually.

text_raw: Oh, hush your jabbering.
text_clean: Oh, hush your jabbering.

text_raw: And you keep flapping your gums in front of guests.
text_clean: And you keep flapping your gums in front of guests.

text_raw: Don't pay him any mind.
text_clean: Don't pay him any mind.

text_raw: If it weren't safe, I wouldn't even think of flying it.
text_clean: If it weren't safe, I wouldn't even think of flying it.

text_raw: Oh, enough!
text_clean: Oh, enough!

text_raw: Just keep an eye on the goods while we're gone!
text_clean: Just keep an eye on the goods while we're gone!

text_raw: What's taking you so long?
text_clean: What's taking you so long?

text_raw: It's this way!
text_clean: It's this way!

text_raw: I'm a bit embarrassed you see us bickering on every visit.
text_clean: I'm a bit embarrassed you see us bickering on every visit.

text_raw: But seriously, the cloudcart is perfectly safe, so don't worry.
text_clean: But seriously, the cloudcart is perfectly safe, so don't worry.

text_raw: He's just got a sparrow's heart, always twittering about safety.
text_clean: He's just got a sparrow's heart, always twittering about safety.

text_raw: You're my honored guest! Of course I checked everything twice.
text_clean: You're my honored guest! Of course I checked everything twice.

text_raw: It's not like it's my first cloudcart, you know.
text_clean: It's not like it's my first cloudcart, you know.

text_raw: Like I already told you, I built them to see the world from the clouds.
text_clean: Like I already told you, I built them to see the world from the clouds.

text_raw: Go on, take in all the new sights. It's my gift to you.
text_clean: Go on, take in all the new sights. It's my gift to you.

text_raw: Listen to yourself!
text_clean: Listen to yourself!

text_raw: You'd put someone in a cloudcart that's barely finished?
text_clean: You'd put someone in a cloudcart that's barely finished?

text_raw: You're always in such a rush.
text_clean: You're always in such a rush.

text_raw: It's not ready...
text_clean: It's not ready...

text_raw: Why are you in such a hurry?
text_clean: Why are you in such a hurry?

text_raw: You snap at me for wanting to do a safety check!
text_clean: You snap at me for wanting to do a safety check!

text_raw: So you just ignore me like you always do, eh?
text_clean: So you just ignore me like you always do, eh?

text_raw: Cut it out.
text_clean: Cut it out.

text_raw: Greymane, if you've any last words, best say them now.
text_clean: Greymane, if you've any last words, best say them now.
